section_subtitle: Don't take our word for it. Read the reviews.

reviews.text: I came in expecting a basic website and left with a five-star dining experience. The attention to detail, the animations, the performance — everything was cooked to perfection.
reviews.author: Sarah Mitchell

reviews.text: Working with Pizza Script felt like having a personal chef for my digital presence. They took our messy brief and turned it into something clean, elegant, and exactly what we needed.
reviews.author: James Nakamura

reviews.text: Fast delivery, clean code, and they actually listened to feedback. Most developers just nod and do their own thing. This one genuinely cares about the recipe.
reviews.author: Priya Sharma

reviews.text: Our website went from a sad frozen pizza to a wood-fired masterpiece. Sales are up 40% since launch. Best money we ever spent on our digital storefront.
reviews.author: Emily Chen
